query:
-- Check Smile IT customer and existing Telstra mobile services
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, COUNT(s.id) as serviceCount, SUM(s.monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId AND s.provider = 'Telstra' AND s.serviceType = 'Mobile'
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Smile IT%' OR c.name LIKE '%SmileIT%'
GROUP BY c.externalId, c.name;

-- Check if any of these phone numbers already exist in the DB
SELECT externalId, phoneNumber, planName, monthlyCost, status, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND serviceType = 'Mobile'
  AND phoneNumber IN ('0400323555','0400338176','0400676294','0400989113','0418974328','0428726634','0448300317')
LIMIT 20;
